column_description: the unique identifier of the customer
the full legal name of the customer
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
The full name of a person typically consists of their given name and surname. This is used for KYC (Know Your Customer) verification.

column_description: the birth date of the customer
the id of the customer's nationality
the id of the customer's occupation
the risk level assigned to this customer
the date when the account was opened
whether the customer is a Politically Exposed Person
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
1 means the customer is a PEP, 0 means not a PEP. PEPs require enhanced due diligence.

column_description: the residential address of the customer
the email address of the customer
